Notice Of Motion To Transfer Action To Proper Venue; Pos
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher R. Thomas, Esq., of the Law Offices of Christopher Thomas, Tel. 510.491.5021, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ARMANDO SOLORIO's Motion To Transfer Action To Proper Venue (Alameda County) is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ARMANDO SOLORIO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT, TO VACATE VOID DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND TO DISMISS COMPLAINT WITH PREJUDICE.
Appearances: Christopher Thomas (510.491.5021) for defendant and moving party; Lee M. Mendelson of the Mendelson Law Group (818.575.6822 x111) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party.
Argued and the court ruled as follows: the court grants the motion to set aside the default and default judgment. The motion to dismiss and request for attorney's fees are denied. This motion is deemed as defendant's general appearance, and the court requires defendant to file a responsive pleading within 10 days. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-02-2011 Continued To Jan-04-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Melanie Gheno #7489.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Angel Daniel Correa, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Armando M. Solorio.
Default was entered against defendant on July 29, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 29, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Angel Daniel Correa, and against the Defaulted Defendant Armando M. Solorio as follows:

Damages/Principal - $80,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $25,446.58.
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $410.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $106,856.58.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
